calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: S. Lerschen.
Petitioner: Connie Isabel Luther, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Isabel Luther.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Reset To Jan-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Petitioner: Connie Isabel Luther, sworn and examined.
Matter continued January 19, 2006, for Plaintiff to submit original proof of service.
